ItacPersonItem.Notes: Joined the Ricovrati in 1679. Some of his sonnets appear in Composizioni per la morte di Elena Lucrezia Cornaro Piscopia (1684). He was part of the Accademia dei Concordi in Rovigo.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
